== Notes for [[Item:Q105056|Q105056]] ==

Capt. Gregorio FERNANDEZ de Tijerina [16],[633] died before 12 February 1688.[788]

Spouse: Beatriz GONZALEZ (aka Beatriz de la Garza). Beatriz GONZALEZ (aka Beatriz de la Garza) and Capt. Gregorio FERNANDEZ de Tijerina were married.

Children were:
*1. Nicolasa FERNANDEZ (aka Nicolasa de la Garza),
*2. Capt. Gregorio FERNANDEZ,
*3. Michaela FERNANDEZ,
*4. Beatriz FERNANDEZ,
*5. Melchora FERNANDEZ (aka Melchora Tijerina),
*6. Leonor FERNANDEZ de Tijerina (aka Juana Hernandez),
*7. Margarita FERNANDEZ,
*8. Andres FERNANDEZ TIJERINA (aka Andres de Tijerina),
*9. Juana FERNANDEZ,
*10. Catarina FERNANDEZ (aka Catarina de Tijerina),
*11. Maria FERNANDEZ (aka Maria de la Garza).

http://www.raullongoria.net/Genealogy/FamilyTree/b68.html#P3723
--------------------
=== GEDCOM Note ===
_CRE DATE 30 SEP 2016 TIME 13:28:00

--------------------
=== GEDCOM Note ===
_CRE DATE 30 SEP 2016 TIME 13:28:00

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000018814167571

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
